name: Base: Full-Body Reference Match
description: Generic base preset: prefer full-body standing candidates that match driving-video pose/camera/reference context. No outfit-specific relation is hardcoded.

0.query: full-body standing person matching the reference video pose and camera framing
must: full body photo showing the entire person head to toe
pose and camera framing matching the reference video
avoid: cropped close-up or partial body shot

1.query: full-body standing person matching the reference video pose and camera framing
must: full body photo showing the entire person head to toe
pose and camera framing matching the reference video
avoid: cropped close-up or partial body shot
